auth.signInSubtitle: Use your Google account to access your team workspace.

legal.privacyIntro: Expiry Alert helps teams track reagent expiry dates and optionally create alerts in Google Calendar.
legal.privacyDataCollectedBody: When you sign in with Google, we store your basic profile (name, email, avatar). We also store data you add in the app, such as reagent names, expiry dates, notes, and team workspace records.
legal.privacyCalendarBody: Calendar access is used only when you explicitly connect Google Calendar and create alerts. The app creates events in your calendar based on your selected active reagents and chosen alert date/time.
legal.privacyStorageBody: Your application data is stored on our managed server infrastructure for app functionality, syncing, and backup operations.
legal.privacySharingBody: We do not sell your personal data. Data is shared only with service providers required to run core app features (for example, Google APIs when you use Google sign-in or Google Calendar features).
legal.privacyUserControlsBody: You can disconnect Google Calendar at any time from Settings. You can request account or data removal by contacting support.
legal.termsIntro: By using Expiry Alert, you agree to these terms.
legal.termsUseBody: Use the app for lawful team operations and inventory tracking. Do not misuse the service, interfere with systems, or attempt unauthorized access.
legal.termsAccountsBody: You are responsible for activity in your account and for keeping your Google account secure. You are responsible for checking and confirming reagent data before operational use.
legal.termsAvailabilityBody: We may update, improve, or change parts of the service over time. Temporary downtime may occur during maintenance or infrastructure incidents.
legal.termsLiabilityBody: The service is provided on an as-is basis. We are not liable for indirect losses resulting from service interruptions, third-party outages, or inaccurate user-entered data.

settings.title: Notification Settings
settings.pushDescription: Receive notifications about expiring reagents on this device.
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences
settings.teamWorkspaceDescription: Choose the workspace this browser is currently working on.
settings.teamAutoAssignHelp: If a user signs in with no team membership, the app automatically creates "<Name>'s Team". If they were invited, they are added to that team when they sign in with the same email.
settings.inviteHelp: If the email already has an account, they are added immediately. Otherwise, they join after first sign-in.
settings.calendarDescription: Download an ICS file with all reagent expiry dates to add to your calendar app.
settings.googleCalendarDescription: Select active (non-archived) reagents and create alert event(s) directly in your Google Calendar.
settings.modeSingle: One shared event for all selected reagents
settings.selectAlertDateTime: Please choose an alert date and time

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this reagent?
confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} reagents?
confirm.deleteMultipleMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} reagents? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.archive: Are you sure you want to archive this reagent?
confirm.archiveMultiple: Are you sure you want to archive {{count}} reagents?
